page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.i4 family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with 16 vCPUs, utilizing a single thread per core configuration. The processing power is driven by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the server includes a bundled 3839 GB SSD. This high-capacity local solid-state storage is integrated directly into the instance profile, making it suitable for data-intensive applications.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The server does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the combination of dedicated Intel Xeon processing cores, a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and substantial local SSD storage, this instance is designed for workloads such as relational databases, NoSQL databases, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.4xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with 16 vCPUs and a single thread per core configuration under the KVM hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core, and includes a bundled 3839 GB local SSD. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. With its high-capacity local storage and dedicated compute resources, this instance is structured for storage-heavy and database workloads, such as transactional databases and data analytics, where local read/write performance and memory capacity are critical.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.4xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB of local SSD storage, designed for database and storage-intensive workloads.
